question_html: ____ Nobel Prize is awarded annually for remarkable contributions.

options_html: We shall discuss about the matter.

question_html: He was elected _____ Chairman of the committee.

options_html: Hearing the good news, I was happy.

Hearing the good news, happy I was.
Hearing the good news, mine was happiness.
correct_answer_html: Hearing the good news, happiness was mine.
